name: How much will AI fake case sanctions cost my law firm?
description: $5K+ fines typical, plus defense fees; Levidow example $5K.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much will AI fake case sanctions cost my law firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: $5K+ fines typical, plus defense fees; Levidow example $5K.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Fines range $1K-$10K per incident plus legal fees; Levidow paid $5K jointly.[1] Key factors: bad faith extent, harm caused, jurisdiction. Budget for bar defense ($10K+), insurance review. Costs escalate with appeals or malpractice claims.
